context: Tests whether the agent instruments a checkout funnel using the correct step type union, dual-destination tracking (dataLayer + API endpoint), SQL funnel report structure with the correct CTE pattern and percentage calculation, field error instrumentation, and advice about analytics ground truth.

checklist.name: FunnelStep type union
checklist.description: Defines a FunnelStep type (or equivalent) that includes all seven named steps: view_product, add_to_cart, begin_checkout, enter_email, enter_shipping, enter_payment, purchase

checklist.name: DataLayer push
checklist.description: Pushes funnel step events to window.dataLayer (e.g. window.dataLayer?.push) with an 'event' property and the funnel step name

checklist.name: Fetch to analytics endpoint
checklist.description: Also sends each funnel step via a fetch POST call to an API endpoint (e.g. /api/analytics/funnel), in addition to the dataLayer push — not just one or the other

checklist.name: Fetch payload includes sessionId and userId
checklist.description: The fetch POST body includes both a session identifier and a user identifier (not just the step name)

checklist.name: SQL uses WITH CTEs
checklist.description: The SQL funnel report uses a WITH clause (CTE) rather than a flat query or subqueries only

checklist.name: SQL counts distinct sessions
checklist.description: The SQL counts COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) (or equivalent unique session counting) per funnel step

checklist.name: SQL 30-day filter
checklist.description: The SQL report filters to the last 30 days (e.g. NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' or equivalent)

checklist.name: SQL step-to-step percentages
checklist.description: The SQL query calculates step-to-step conversion rate percentages (e.g. dividing one step's count by the previous step's count), using division-by-zero protection (NULLIF or CASE WHEN)

checklist.name: Field error event tracking
checklist.description: Tracks form validation errors by listening to the 'invalid' event on form elements (not just onSubmit or a custom approach) and records which field triggered the error

checklist.name: Field error sent to endpoint
checklist.description: Sends field error data via a fetch/API call to an analytics endpoint (e.g. /api/analytics/field-error), not just logging to console

checklist.name: Server-side ground truth
checklist.description: analytics-notes.md states that the server-side / internal order database should be treated as the source of truth when reconciling discrepancies, and explains why front-end analytics tools may under-count (ad blockers, script errors, etc.)

checklist.name: Per-field error counting
checklist.description: Field error tracking accumulates counts per field name (e.g. a counter/map keyed by field name) rather than only recording individual events

checklist.name: SQL daily grouping
checklist.description: The SQL report groups results by day (e.g. DATE_TRUNC('day', ...) or equivalent)
